items: All 10 public pages fully implemented (Phase 3 complete)
Homepage with hero banner carousel, quick links, broadcasts, achievements (Week 6)
Siaran (Broadcasts) listing and detail pages (Week 7)
Pencapaian (Achievements) listing and detail pages (Week 7)
Statistik (Statistics) page with Chart.js visualizations (Week 8)
Direktori (Staff Directory) with Livewire live search (Week 8)
Dasar (Policy) listing with file download counter (Week 9)
Profil Kementerian (Ministry Profile) page (Week 9)
Hubungi Kami (Contact Us) with Livewire contact form and rate limiting (Week 9)
Static pages (Penafian, Dasar Privasi) served via CMS (Week 9)
Search page with Livewire SearchResults component (Week 9)
XML Sitemap with dynamic broadcast and static page URLs (Week 9)
Custom error pages (404, 403, 500) with bilingual support (Week 9)
Accessibility menu (CTRL+U) with font size, font type, background color, and contrast settings
WordPress-like theme system with auto-discovery and fallback resolution
Google Analytics and custom analytics script support
Forgot password functionality
Password confirmation in user settings
Danger zone with account deletion
Frontend updated to MyDS design system tokens (Poppins headings, Inter body, full color scales)
CSS architecture: two-layer --raw-* / --color-* variable system for runtime theme switching
Theme assets (CSS, JS, views) moved into resources/themes/default/
Directory page display issues
Statistics page query errors
Tailwind v4 @theme inline not generating semantic utility classes (bg-bg, text-text, border-border, etc.)
Platform version tracking with changelog display
User activity log viewer for monitoring and auditing
Activity logging on all 16 models (LogsActivity trait)
Content preview with signed URLs
Content revision history and restore
Menu system upgraded to 4-level nested items with role visibility
Admin menu display in English locale
